reasons: A new bundled continuity layer now gives repo-native naming, indexing, and portal presentation for captured deliberations and wave plans without enabling action.
The seeded conversation record is derived from the current motion-0169 recommendation and links motions, waves, work packets, candidate actions, and copy-only next prompts.
The seeded wave plan uses the required nh_id hierarchy and acts as a planning spine that connects deliberation, continuity capture, and next-action direction.
Imported archive chat browsing remains available, while continuity records are clearly separated from older imported archive material.
Required gates passed, no API or DB mutation was added, no runtime or proof files changed, and no existing motion packages were modified.
No automatic live capture, execution, branch write, PR creation, dispatch, scheduler behavior, credential enablement, or cross-repo mutation capability was introduced.
